DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JUSTIN TIN, SAN BRUNO AVENUE DENTAL CLINIC, LLC, SAN BRUNO PROPERTIES LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IS GRANTED, AS FOLLOWS. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION THAT FOR THE MOTION TO BE MERITORIOUS IT MUST BE TITLED A MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES IS OVERRULED FOR TWO REASONS. FIRST, THE MPA CITES TO CCP SECTIONS 2031.010 AND 2031.300 WHICH SECTIONS INCLUDE BOTH A MOTION TO COMPEL AND MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES. SECOND, DEFENDANT FAILED TO RESPOND AT ALL TO RFPS 3-7. A MOTION TO COMPEL THESE RESPONSES WOULD BE TITLED A MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION THAT THE MOTION WAS BROUGHT ON BEHALF OF TWO ADDITIONAL PARTIES IS NOTED, BUT INSUFFICIENT TO DENY THE MOTION. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO RFP 1-10. DEFENDANT GREATWALL SHALL PROVIDE AMENDED RESPONSES AND PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS WITHIN 21 DAYS OF THIS ORDER, TOGETHER WITH A PRIVILEGE LOG LISTING ALL DOCUMENTS WITHHELD ON THE BASIS OF PRIVILEGE. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $600 ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT GREATWALL BUILDING CONTRACTOR, INC. AND ITS ATTORNEY HENRY WIRTA. SANCTIONS ARE PAYABLE WITHIN 21 DAYS OF THIS ORDER. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION THAT PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL FAILED TO PROVIDE FOUNDATIONAL FACTS TO SUPPORT THE SANCTIONS AWARD IS OVERRULED. SEE CATALANO DECL., 3:7-9. DEFENDANT HAS NOT PRESENTED ANY EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT OPPOSED THE MOTION "WITH SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION" OR OTHER CIRCUMSTANCES MAKE SANCTIONS "UNJUST." CCP 2031.320(B) (DOCUMENT PRODUCTION STATUTE), 2023.030(A) (GENERAL SANCTIONS STATUTE). ORDER SIGNED WITH MODIFICATIONS. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. NOT REPORTED. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar May-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jannik Catalano of Catalano Law Group telephone nmuber 415-436-9236 for Plaintiff.
Henry Wirta of Harrington, Foxx, Dubrow & Canter, LLP telephone number 415-288-6600 for Defendant Greatwall Building Contractor, Inc.

Both Counsel stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JUSTIN TIN, SAN BRUNO AVENUE DENTAL CLINIC, LLC, SAN BRUNO PROPERTIES LLC'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED, as follows. Defendant's Objection that for the Motion to be meritorious it must be titled a motion to compel further responses is overruled for two reasons. First, the MPA cites to CCP Sections 2031.010 and 2031.300 which sections include both a motion to compel and motion to compel further responses. Second, defendant failed to respond at all to RFPs 3-7. A motion to compel these responses would be titled a motion to compel responses. Defendant's objection that the motion was brought on behalf of two additional parties is noted, but insufficient to deny the Motion. The Motion is GRANTED as to RFP 1-10. Defendant Greatwall shall provide amended responses and produce responsive documents within 21 days of this order, together with a privilege log listing all documents withheld on the basis of privilege. Sanctions in the amount of $600 are awarded against Defendant Greatwall Building Contractor, Inc. and its attorney Henry Wirta. Sanctions are payable within 21 days of this order. Defendant's objection that plaintiffs' counsel failed to provide foundational facts to support the sanctions award is overruled. See Catalano Decl., 3:7-9. Defendant has not presented any evidence that defendant opposed the motion "with substantial justification" or other circumstances make sanctions "unjust." CCP 2031.320(b) (document production statute), 2023.030(a) (general sanctions statute). Order signed with modifications.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)
